title: macrotyloma uniflorum
intro: Macrotyloma uniflorum, also known as horse gram, is a type of annual legume native to the Indian subcontinent. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial agent. The health benefits of consuming Macrotyloma uniflorum include reducing blood sugar levels, lowering cholesterol, and aiding in weight management. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for its medicinal uses, as well as being consumed as a sprouted or roasted seed for its nutritional benefits.
